sprite_silk_attire.name: Sprite-Silk Attire
sprite_silk_attire.description: A vibrant leafy tunic woven with glowing pink threads that flutter like tiny wings.
sprite_silk_attire.lore: Worn by Fairy scouts. Gives your beast the confident stride of something that belongs in the forest.

gnome_iron_plating.name: Gnome-Iron Plating
gnome_iron_plating.description: Slightly oversized clunky iron armor with a tiny round shield. Sturdy little knight energy.
gnome_iron_plating.lore: Built by Goblins trying to impersonate knights. Somehow works better than it looks.

kelpie_scale_mail.name: Kelpie-Scale Mail
kelpie_scale_mail.description: Iridescent teal armor that glistens as if wet, trailing faint bubbles.
kelpie_scale_mail.lore: The Kelpie would like this back. You found it fair and square.

cinder_guard_vest.name: Cinder-Guard Vest
cinder_guard_vest.description: Dark obsidian trim with a core that glows with smoldering orange flame.
cinder_guard_vest.lore: Hellhound-adjacent gear. Your beast will smell like embers for weeks.

unicorn_healer_vestments.name: Unicorn-Healer Vestments
unicorn_healer_vestments.description: Elegant pure-white flowing robes emitting a soft comforting silver aura.
unicorn_healer_vestments.lore: The Unicorn contributed the hair willingly. That should make you feel better about wearing this.

basilisk_gaze_pauldrons.name: Basilisk Gaze Pauldrons
basilisk_gaze_pauldrons.description: Heavy pauldrons carved from petrified basilisk eyes. Enemies caught in their gaze at battle start have a 30% chance to lose speed. Critical hits have a 15% chance to briefly petrify the target.
basilisk_gaze_pauldrons.lore: The serpents carved into these appear to track movement. Do not look directly at them.

phoenix_born_shroud.name: Phoenix-Born Shroud
phoenix_born_shroud.description: A magnificent cape of pure crackling fire-feathers. They don't burn you. Mostly.
phoenix_born_shroud.lore: Forged from ashes that refuse to grow cold.

thunderbird_storm_mail.name: Thunderbird Storm-Mail
thunderbird_storm_mail.description: Sleek blue-and-gold spiked armor crackling with static electricity when your beast moves.
thunderbird_storm_mail.lore: The sparks are not decorative. They are extremely, personally invested in every battle.

dragon_lord_aegis.name: Dragon-Lord Aegis
dragon_lord_aegis.description: Massive diamond-hard crimson scales wrapping your beast like a protective dragon shell.
dragon_lord_aegis.lore: The Dragon that shed these is still out there. It's not angry. But it's keeping count.

abyssal_shroud.name: The Abyssal Shroud
abyssal_shroud.description: A cloak of living midnight shadow that blurs your beast's edges, making them look ghostly.
abyssal_shroud.lore: The Kraken wove this from its own ink. It's an art piece. A very dangerous art piece.

chronos_paradox_plate.name: Chronos Paradox Plate
chronos_paradox_plate.description: Golden clockwork plates floating around your beast, accompanied by a faint ticking sound.
chronos_paradox_plate.lore: Twine gets very quiet around this armor. That either means it approves or it's afraid. Hard to tell.

blight_weaver_regalia.name: Blight-Weaver Regalia
blight_weaver_regalia.description: Corrupted branching black horn armor pulsing with unstable violet nebula patterns.
blight_weaver_regalia.lore: Made from what the Loom left behind after a Sundering. It remembers being unfinished.

mossbark_wrapping.name: Mossbark Wrapping
mossbark_wrapping.description: Strips of enchanted bark bound together with pixie silk. The forest holds things together.
mossbark_wrapping.lore: Common beasts that survive their first year tend to be found wearing something like this. Nobody taught them. They figured it out.

emberstone_vest.name: Emberstone Vest
emberstone_vest.description: Gnome-iron plates set in hellhound ember resin. Reflects a fraction of what hits it.
emberstone_vest.lore: Anything that spends enough time near Hellhounds picks up their habits. One of those habits is making things that touch you regret it.

thornweave_cloak.name: Thornweave Cloak
thornweave_cloak.description: Woven from bark thorns and harpy feathers. When struck, the thorns answer.
thornweave_cloak.lore: The thorns don't care who started it. That's what makes them useful.

deepwater_hide.name: Deepwater Hide
deepwater_hide.description: Cured kelpie hide layered with harpy down. Dense enough to slow water, light enough to move in.
deepwater_hide.lore: The kelpie didn't use it anymore. Something else did. The hide keeps its habits.

pixie_ribbon.name: Pixie Ribbon
pixie_ribbon.description: A cute glowing bow. Small but sincere.
pixie_ribbon.lore: Fairies tie these on things they like. Your beast is now a thing a Fairy liked.

gnome_forged_buckler.name: Gnome-Forged Buckler
gnome_forged_buckler.description: A tiny sturdy shield. Boosts defense reliably.
gnome_forged_buckler.lore: Gnomes make ten of these for every one they sell. Quality control is taken seriously.

wyvern_talon.name: Wyvern Talon
wyvern_talon.description: A sharp glowing claw accessory. Increases critical hit chance.
wyvern_talon.lore: The Wyvern that dropped this was going fast. So were you.

thunderbird_feathers.name: Thunderbird Feather
thunderbird_feathers.description: A single primary feather from a Thunderbird. Channels residual storm energy — each hit you land restores 8 mana.
thunderbird_feathers.lore: These crackle constantly. Storing them near electronics is not recommended.

core_of_the_phoenix.name: Core of the Phoenix
core_of_the_phoenix.description: If the equipped beast faints, it deals a massive fire explosion to the enemy.
core_of_the_phoenix.lore: The Phoenix put something of itself in here. It's not quite gone. Use it wisely.

ouroboros_ring.name: Ouroboros Ring
ouroboros_ring.description: A tiny glowing ring. The equipped beast heals for 15% of all damage it deals.
ouroboros_ring.lore: The snake eating its own tail figured something out. This is the leftover.

iron_dust_chip.name: Iron Dust Chip
iron_dust_chip.description: A shard of gnome-iron worn smooth by grinding. Dense. Works harder the harder the beast wearing it hits.
iron_dust_chip.lore: Simple. The gnomes make them by accident and sell them on purpose.

bark_sigil.name: Bark Sigil
bark_sigil.description: A carved piece of enchanted bark. Adds to what's already there, and then a little more for every beast it's worn by.
bark_sigil.lore: The tree didn't need this piece anymore. A beast will.

ember_spark.name: Ember Spark
ember_spark.description: A fragment of hellhound ember set in iron. It bites.
ember_spark.lore: The Hellhound left something behind in everything it ever touched. This is that something, extracted and made useful.

kelpie_charm.name: Kelpie Charm
kelpie_charm.description: A carved kelpie scale on a silk cord. Water moves fast. So do things shaped like it.
kelpie_charm.lore: Kelpie don't understand why anyone would want this. They move fast naturally. The charm doesn't make you a Kelpie. It just borrows the idea.
